name: PT Bumi Teknokultura Unggul Tbk
summary: PT Bumi Teknokultura Unggul Tbk engages in cocoa bean processing activities in Indonesia. It also has various forest concession rights located in Papua Barat. In addition, the company engages in the nursery of forestry plants, food crops, medicinal plants, logging and tropical ornamental plants, as well as trading of logs. PT Bumi Teknokultura Unggul Tbk was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.
